The '''Tau Sakar system''', also known as the '''Garban system''',<ref name="SWR">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref> was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Abrion sector/Legends|Abrion sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] which contained seven life-bearing [[Planet/Legends|planets]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Tau Sakar]]. [[Garban]], the fourth planet in the system, was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known as the [[Jenet/Legends|Jenet]]. All seven worlds were very similar. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took control of this system, and forced the Jenet to mine the rich [[Ore/Legends|ores]] that are found in all seven planets.
